prompt: Write a letter to complain about a faulty product, explain the problem, and request a solution.
text:
Dear Sir or Madam,

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with a laptop that I bought from your store last week. Unfortunately, the service I received was not up to standard, and the product stopped working after only two days.

The main problem is that the screen turns off suddenly while I am using it. To make matters worse, your staff did not offer any useful support when I called the customer service desk. However, this situation has caused considerable inconvenience because I need the laptop for my online classes.

I would like to request a refund or a replacement as soon as possible. Please look into this matter and let me know how it will be resolved. I trust this matter will be resolved promptly.

Yours faithfully,
Nghia
